modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unauthorized printing of multiple pages to network printer.

full_description_text:  
The user returned to work after the weekend. They found that the printer had produced 90 pages of transcripts. The user is unsure who initiated the printing.
short_description: Unauthorized printing of multiple pages to network printer.
description: The user returned to work after the weekend. They found that the printer had produced 90 pages of transcripts. The user is unsure who initiated the printing.
